## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance is strong: close to overall peaks, increased non-branded clicks, and ranking in top 10 for almost every pillar](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - LLM visibility stable at \#5 overall, top 3 for key pillars; opportunity to improve miscellaneous queries
  - [New strategies discussed: Medium republishing, creating subreddits, and leveraging competitor pages for enhanced visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Review

  - [7 articles published last week, 10 in queue for review](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [On track to deliver 7 articles this week](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [First model review page staged in Framer, awaiting production push](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

### SEO Performance Update

  - [GSC data trusted after Google's recent issues](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Close to overall peaks in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Increase in non-branded clicks](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Ranking in top 10 for almost every pillar, many near top 5](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Governance pillar in top 3 for several articles](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Galileo (332) vs. Arise (906) in SEMrush competitor update](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

### LLM Visibility

  - [No major changes detected](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - Galileo at \#5 overall behind Braintrust and Arise
  - [Top spot or top 3 for several prompt categories](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Lagging in miscellaneous queries and enterprise-related searches](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Strategy: Map competitor-cited prompts to existing/upcoming content as H2s/H3s](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Galileo citations rose from 3% to 4%, competitors from 5-6% to 7%](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)

### Content Refresh and Strategy

  - [Incorporate mapped prompt responses into blog refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Consider adding FAQ sections to existing content](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Prioritize creating wireframes for competitor pages](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Jackson to publish model page for indexing, delay adding to resource navigation](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)

### Enhancing GEO Presence and AI Answer Associations

  - [Create standalone content hubs for easy referencing](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Improve content chunking with stand-alone H2s and H3s](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Explore off-site placements (Reddit influence decreased to \~10%)](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Consider republishing content on Medium](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Potential creation of focused subreddits (e.g., AI observability)](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)

### SEO Milestone

  - [Galileo.ai now ranking ahead for its own search term (partly due to competitor rebranding)](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jackson to finalize and share wireframe for competitive pages](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Publish model page for indexing](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [GrowthX to start on content refreshes based on priority list](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Mara to research and provide info on Medium republishing and subreddit creation strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Explore creation of problem-solution database](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Continue creating competitor pages as blogs](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Investigate potential for additional work stream or strategy sprint for third-party site validation](https://fathom.video/share/ECkDewhygSV1AxkzamFiwWyyY3GnRLcK?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
